name: 电磁波谱
subject: physics
curriculum_points: 3 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation v = s / t
4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs
5 Determine, qualitatively, from given data or the shape of a distance–time graph or speed–time graph when an object is: (a) at rest (b) moving with constant speed (c) accelerating (d) decelerating

excerpts.text: 3 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation v = s / t
4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs
5 Determine, qualitatively, from given data or the shape of a distance–time graph or speed–time graph when an object is: (a) at rest (b) moving with constant speed (c) accelerating (d) decelerating

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「电磁波谱」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：3 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation v = s / t…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs… 对理解「电磁波谱」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
